deterministicFindings.message: Control 'Button2' uses a default auto-generated name. Rename with a 3-char type prefix + purpose, e.g. 'claPurpose'.
Control 'Gallery1' uses a default auto-generated name. Rename with a 3-char type prefix + purpose, e.g. 'galPurpose'.
global variable 'unusedVar' lacks the 'gbl' prefix convention.

deterministicFindings.evidence: Inconsistent global variable naming: 1 without 'gbl' prefix (unusedVar) vs 2 with prefix (gblCount, gblUser)
deterministicFindings.message: global variable naming is inconsistent: 1 name(s) lack the 'gbl' prefix (unusedVar) while 2 name(s) correctly use it (gblCount, gblUser). Adopt the 'gbl' prefix consistently so variables can be located by prefix search.
global variable 'gblCount' is set but never read. Remove it or wire it up.
global variable 'unusedVar' is set but never read. Remove it or wire it up.
Collection 'colCustomers' is built but never referenced. Remove the Collect/ClearCollect or use it.
Data source 'Archive' is connected but never referenced in any formula. Remove the connection to shrink the app.
Screen 'OrphanScreen' is never targeted by a Navigate() and is not the start screen. It may be an orphan (verify it isn't the default first screen or reached via a variable).
Control 'btnSave' is never referenced by any formula but may be intentional (visible; has live event handler). Verify it is not dead (decorative/layout controls are fine unreferenced).
Control 'Button2' is never referenced by any formula but may be intentional (visible; has live event handler). Verify it is not dead (decorative/layout controls are fine unreferenced).

Control 'Gallery1' is never referenced by any formula but may be intentional (visible; has live event handler; surfaces data via Items). Verify it is not dead (decorative/layout controls are fine unreferenced).
Control 'galOrders' is never referenced by any formula but may be intentional (visible; surfaces data via Items). Verify it is not dead (decorative/layout controls are fine unreferenced).
Control 'lblOrphan' is never referenced by any formula but may be intentional (visible). Verify it is not dead (decorative/layout controls are fine unreferenced).
Control 'lblSame' is never referenced by any formula but may be intentional (visible; surfaces data via Text). Verify it is not dead (decorative/layout controls are fine unreferenced).
Control 'lblWelcome' is never referenced by any formula but may be intentional (visible; surfaces data via Text). Verify it is not dead (decorative/layout controls are fine unreferenced).

2 controls share an identical type and property set (likely copy-paste): lblSame (src/DetailScreen.pa.yaml:13); lblWelcome (src/HomeScreen.pa.yaml:15). Extract the repeated layout into a Canvas Component with input properties for the differing parts.
deterministicFindings.sortKey: Label|Text==Concatenate("Hello ", gblUser, " welcome to the application dashboard")

deterministicFindings.evidence: =Concatenate("Hello ", gblUser, " welcome to the application dashboard")
deterministicFindings.message: Identical formula repeated 2 times: DetailScreen->lblSame.Text (src/DetailScreen.pa.yaml:16); HomeScreen->lblWelcome.Text (src/HomeScreen.pa.yaml:18). Extract to a named formula (App.Formulas), a component, or a With() subexpression.

deterministicFindings.citation: coding-standards-and-performance.md section 1 (Magic values / Repeated literals) - general maintainability guidance: centralize hardcoded literals into named formulas (App.Formulas) or constants: https://learn.microsoft.com/power-apps/guidance/coding-guidelines/code-readability
deterministicFindings.message: Magic number literal 42 in App.OnStart. Consider extracting to a named formula (App.Formulas) or a named constant so the value is centralized and self-documenting.

leads.hint: App.OnStart contains 2 Set() and 2 Collect() calls. Static initializations belong in App.Formulas (named formulas, ~80% load win). Keep Set only for state that changes. See coding-standards-and-performance.md.
Navigate() inside App.OnStart blocks first render until OnStart finishes. Replace with declarative App.StartScreen. (Confirmed pattern.)
2 sequential Collect/ClearCollect calls. If independent, wrap in Concurrent() to wait only for the longest. Caveat: only when calls don't depend on each other.
LookUp on 'Customers'. First arg 'Customers' resolves to a server data source. Check delegation.md for the connector matrix. ALWAYS tag delegation findings 'Potential - verify row count'.
A LookUp/Filter/Search appears inside ForAll - potential per-row (N+1) network calls. Batch with a single Collect up front, or reshape at the source. (Potential - high impact.)
A data mutation (Patch/Collect/Remove/SubmitForm) with no IfError() wrapper or Errors() check nearby. Recommend user-facing error handling. (Potential - some operations are low-risk; judge.)
Filter on 'Orders'. First arg 'Orders' resolves to a server data source. Check delegation.md for the connector matrix. ALWAYS tag delegation findings 'Potential - verify row count'.
